neurons.logic: strong_internals / weak_internals / neutral_internals based on market_internals field

neurons.description: Tape speed (order flow pace) at entry
neurons.logic: fast_tape / slow_tape / normal_tape based on tape_speed field

neurons.description: Options skew (call vs put bias) at entry
neurons.logic: call_skew / put_skew / neutral_skew based on options_skew field

neurons.description: Dark pool activity level at entry
neurons.logic: high_dark_pool / low_dark_pool / normal_dark_pool based on dark_pool_activity field
high_inst_own if inst_ownership > 70%, low_inst_own if inst_ownership < 20%, else medium_inst_own
fast_rotation / slow_rotation / normal_rotation based on float_rotation field

neurons.description: News sentiment score tier at entry
neurons.logic: very_positive / negative / slightly_positive based on news_sentiment_score field
viral_trending / moderate_buzz / no_social_signal based on social_momentum field

neurons.description: Most recent earnings surprise magnitude at entry
neurons.logic: big_beat / miss / small_beat based on earnings_surprise field

neurons.description: Management guidance revision direction at entry
neurons.logic: raised_guidance / lowered_guidance / maintained based on guidance_direction field
